content.text: I'll read all four frames to compare the video frames against the page screenshot.
[Image: original 1280x5673, displayed at 451x2000. Multiply coordinates by 2.84 to map to original image.]

The score/meter/params concept is lilac purple in video-01 ('?' box), video-02 (dial), video-03 (meter needle) and the lilac purple bars in page-01. Background is deep navy and labels warm cream across both media. No concept swaps color between video and page.","suggestion":"None needed; semantic colors are consistent across media."},{"ruleId":"V21","pass":true,"severity":"blocking","evidence":"Both media use only Night School palette: deep navy bg, warm cream text, periwinkle blue (observed), lilac purple (params/meter), amber (video-02 '-6.0' score/heat).
